one_time_description: Legal settlements received during the year
economic_notes: Sts'ailes Development Limited Partnership and Sts'ailes Development Corporation changed status to GBEs effective January 1, 2023. Harrison Salmon Producers Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Eco Energy Development partnerships (Sakwi and Bremner Trio) are related entities. Defined contribution pension plan in place.
notes: Sts'ailes Development LP and Sts'ailes Development Corporation changed from consolidated subsidiaries to GBEs effective January 1, 2023, creating a $1,436,862 change in status adjustment to accumulated surplus. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $16,858,367 + Province of BC $5,260,222 + First Nation Health Authority $3,357,448 + CMHC $60,489 + FNESC $1,223,773 + SASET $756,586 = $27,516,885 approximate. OSR includes economic activity, contracts, other revenue, interest, investment income, rental income, legal settlements, and losses. Term loans due on demand of $1,941,998 included in financing repayments. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. GBEs accounted for by modified equity: Harrison Salmon Producers LP and Sts'ailes Development LP/Corp.
